name: ICANIC BRANDS CO. INC.
summary: ICANIC BRANDS CO. INC. is a consumer packaged goods company focused on the health, wellness, and recreation space, creating a portfolio of brands, which offers a range of cannabinoid products, including edibles, vapes, and concentrates. The company's business model involves developing, marketing, and distributing these products through various channels. ICANIC BRANDS CO. INC. is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.
